caption: A man wearing a large, grey, pointed wig, glasses, a white button-down shirt, a bow tie, and tan suspenders is seated in a studio setting. He wears black headphones and speaks into a black microphone positioned in front of him. Behind him is a wall decorated with various framed photographs and clothing items, including shirts with "LEE" branding. A logo on the left side of the screen reads "STUDIO PODCAST" and a red and white logo on the right reads "SS TALK JOY". Across the sequence, the man is captured mid-speech; he begins by raising his right hand toward his head, then lowers it as he continues talking, and finally rests his hand near his chest. His facial expression remains focused as he interacts with the recording equipment in the room.
